statement: In every magma, Equation 3391 (`x * y = z * (x * (w * x))`) implies Equation 4539 (`x * (y * z) = (y * w) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0212
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op x (op w x)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op y w) u)
